channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] The Field Guide to Fable
item.description: [AINews] The Field Guide to Fable

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Improving LLMs via Validator-to-Generator Alignment
item.description: FCPA training method reduces LLM inconsistency through frequency-corrected generator-validator alignment, improving consistency and performance by up to 27pp.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Echoes of Unrest: A Multimodal NLP Framework for Early Warning of Fake News and Violence-Driven Mob Activity
item.description: Multimodal NLP framework combining text, images, and metadata achieves 98% accuracy detecting misinformation and predicting mob violence escalation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reinforcement Learning for Data-Efficient Code-Switched ASR
item.description: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards enables data-efficient adaptation of audio models to code-switched speech recognition across language pairs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
item.description: TTS-generated synthetic speech enables spoken question answering for low-resource Luxembourgish without large human-recorded corpora.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Gemma 4 Technical Report
item.description: Gemma 4 introduces multimodal language models (2.3B-31B) with encoder-free architecture, reasoning mode, and improved performance across STEM and multimodal benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
item.description: Researchers find LLMs vulnerable to narrative-based attacks in rule-enforced environments, with pseudo-logical reasoning being the dominant exploit across tested models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Jointly Improving Dialect Identification and ASR in Indian Languages using Multimodal Feature Fusion
item.description: Multimodal framework jointly improves speech recognition and dialect identification for eight Indian languages through feature fusion.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PraMem: Practice-derived Experiential Memory for Long-horizon Behavior Prediction
item.description: Researchers propose PraMem, which builds experiential memory from historical sequences to enhance LLM-based long-horizon behavior prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Where do LLMs Fall Short in CBT-Guided Affective Reasoning?
item.description: LLMs achieve high CBT theory scores but fail in application; a multiple chain-of-thought framework improves strategy selection in CBT-guided affective reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Distill Where the Student Goes: Teacher-Regularized RL for English-Evidence Cross-Lingual RAG
item.description: TR-RAG combines teacher-regularized reinforcement learning with distillation to reduce language drift in cross-lingual RAG systems using English evidence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hierarchical Sparse Attention Done Right: Toward Infinite Context Modeling
item.description: HiLS Attention mechanism achieves full-attention performance while enabling 64x context length extrapolation beyond training sequences.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] psytechlab at CLPsych 2026: Utilising Natural Language Processing methods and Large Language Models for Social Media Text Analysis
item.description: Researchers used NLP and LLM methods to analyze mental health states from social media, achieving top summarization scores in the CLPsych 2026 shared task.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Alignment-Guided Largest Table Overlap Size Estimation
item.description: ALORE estimates table overlaps using alignment-guided row-column structure encoding instead of independent table embeddings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Don't Wait to Reply: Towards Responsive yet Thoughtful Dialogue through Proactive Thinking
item.description: Researchers propose Proactive Thinking, allowing LLMs to pre-compute response elements during pauses to reduce latency in conversational AI.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conditional Diffusion Guided Knowledge Transfer for Multi-Domain Knowledge Graph Completion
item.description: Researchers propose DMKGC, a diffusion-based method for multi-domain knowledge graph completion that generates domain-general embeddings while preserving domain-specific information.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Role of Prompt Language and Translation-Theory-Driven Prompts in Large Language Models: A Case Study on Spanish-Chinese Journalistic Translation
item.description: Translation theory-driven prompts improve Spanish-Chinese journalistic translation quality in human evaluation, despite automated metrics favoring simpler baseline approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] KARMA: Knowledge graph-based Automated Reasoning Materialization and Alignment
item.description: KARMA improves contrastive synthesis by enumerating knowledge graph paths and applying slot-parallel alignment across biomedical, computer-science, and chemistry benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] S-DiverSe: Spanish Diverse Speech
item.description: S-DiverSe dataset includes 3.2 hours of Spanish speech from 22 speakers with neurological conditions for ASR evaluation and development.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TACG: Trajectory-Aware Commit Gating for Diffusion Language Model Decoding
item.description: TACG decoder leverages token prediction trajectories to optimize commitment timing in diffusion language model decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Gentlemen to Frontiermen: Masculine Formations in English-Language Fiction (1771--1930)
item.description: Study of 150 English novels (1771–1930) finds masculine ideals shifted from inherited authority to commercial and frontier-adventure formations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Judgments to Issues: Structured Extraction of Legal Reasoning with Citation-Hallucination Control
item.description: Automated pipeline extracts structured legal issues from Italian tax-court judgments using DeepSeek V3, with hallucination filtering for citation accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Efficient Decentralized Multi-task Dataset Valuation via Model Merging
item.description: DMVM framework values datasets in multi-task settings using model merging without retraining or sharing raw data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Spectral Signatures of Large Language Models
item.description: Spectral signatures of model weights enable efficient tracking of LLM lineage, clustering, and performance evaluation without external data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Classics at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Combining Transformer Models and LLM-Generated Annotations for Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
item.description: Team uses transformer ensemble with LLM-generated annotations for SemEval-2026 dimensional aspect-based sentiment analysis predicting valence and arousal scores.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CaresAI at SMM4H-HeaRD 2026: Predicting TNM Staging
item.description: Researchers predict TNM cancer staging independently from pathology reports using clinical embeddings and machine learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Learning from Lost Provenance: Multiple Instance Learning for Cancer Registry Tumor Group Classification
item.description: Attention-based multiple instance learning enables automated cancer pathology coding using patient-level labels without per-report annotations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Lacuna Inc. at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Structurally Gated State-Space Models for Disentangling Narrative Similarity
item.description: State-space model with structurally gated alignment separates causal plot patterns from superficial elements for narrative similarity evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reading Between the Dots: Decoding Hidden Computation across Filler Tokens
item.description: Researchers reveal LLMs encode hidden reasoning over filler tokens in internal states, recoverable with 80-95% accuracy via unsupervised decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mental Health Disorder Detection Beyond Social Media: A Systematic Review of Available Datasets
item.description: Systematic review identifies non-social media datasets for mental health disorder detection, finding most focus on English and depression with gaps in diversity and clinical relevance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] They Infer What You Meant: Models Represent Communicative Intent More Reliably Than They Act On It
item.description: Language models internally represent communicative intent more robustly than they act on it, often responding to surface meaning instead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Auditing the Audit: Five Failure Modes in Benchmark-Validity Audits
item.description: Paper identifies five failure modes where hidden implementation details in benchmark-validity audits can silently produce false conclusions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Evaluating Time Series Foundation Models for Electricity Price Forecasting: Contamination Risk, Distributional Shifts, and Covariate Dependence
item.description: Time series foundation models show competitive performance in electricity price forecasting but critically depend on covariate support and benefit from domain method ensembles.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] QuantFlow: A Federated Mamba-Based Post-Transformer Foundation Model for Time-Series Forecasting
item.description: QuantFlow combines Mamba state-space models with federated learning for privacy-preserving time-series forecasting across diverse domains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GRAFT: Grafted Reference Audio for Fine-grained Pronunciation in Zero-shot Text-to-Speech
item.description: GRAFT uses reference audio samples to improve pronunciation accuracy in zero-shot text-to-speech, reducing target-word phoneme error by 22-39%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Learning for Object Detection: Enabling Collaborative Drone Learning Without Centralizing Data
item.description: Federated learning enables collaborative drone object detection while maintaining data privacy, achieving performance comparable to centralized training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Post-Generation Curation of Synthetic Images via Homogeneous-Heterogeneous Splitting
item.description: Method selects informative synthetic image subsets by counteracting generator bias toward canonical modes, matching real-data performance with 40% fewer samples.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Granularity-Aware EEG Feature Framework for Psychopathology Dimension Prediction
item.description: Multi-scale EEG features reveal weak but detectable associations with dimensional psychopathology using tree-based prediction models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LiNO: Lifting based multiresolution neural operator
item.description: LiNO uses wavelet lifting to create a multiresolution neural operator that captures multiscale features when learning to solve differential equations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Weighted Conformal Prediction for Lab-to-Track Thermal Transfer in EV Motorsport Powertrains
item.description: Weighted conformal prediction method achieves modest improvement in thermal uncertainty bounds for EV models under lab-to-track covariate shift.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Out-of-Distribution Generalization of Risk Aversion in Language Models
item.description: Research introduces benchmark showing risk aversion trained on low-stakes scenarios in language models generalizes substantially across 98 orders of magnitude.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Safe Inference-Time Alignment via Lagrangian Reward Augmentation
item.description: LARA, a new inference-time alignment method, uses Lagrangian optimization to enforce safety constraints in language model generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Induction Heads Interpolate N-Grams
item.description: Induction heads interpolate n-gram estimators using soft context-matching and pseudo-count smoothing, connecting mechanistic interpretability with classical statistical methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Training Hybrid Block Diffusion Language Models with Partial Bidirectionality
item.description: BDLM Mamba-attention hybrid model improves long-context generation throughput 19.7x by restricting reverse scans to denoising blocks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Less Tokens, Better Forecasts: Sparse Residual Routing for Efficient Weather Prediction
item.description: Sparse-Reslim routing module improves weather forecasting efficiency by processing only 25% of spatial tokens through expensive transformer blocks as residual updates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Design Space of Discrete Diffusion Online Adaptation for Molecular Optimization
item.description: Study identifies complementary design choices for online adaptation of discrete diffusion models in molecular optimization tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Labeled-Data-Free Meta-Learning: Efficient Task Generation Using Pre-trained Models and Unlabeled Data
item.description: Novel meta-learning approach generates tasks using pre-trained models and unlabeled data, avoiding expensive model inversion and achieving significant speedup and accuracy gains.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Trading Confidence: Comprehensive Uncertainty Estimation in Algorithmic Trading
item.description: An uncertainty-aware RL framework combining distributional, epistemic, and aleatoric uncertainty estimation outperforms traditional trading models on U.S. stock indices.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reward Granularity in RLVR: Comparing Process and Outcome Reward Structures for Mathematical Reasoning in Small Language Models
item.description: Process-level rewards substantially outperform outcome-only rewards for mathematical reasoning in small language models, achieving 63.73% versus 53.75% accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Poisson-Gamma Modeling of Inter-Relational Dependencies in Dynamic Knowledge Graphs
item.description: PGRE uses Poisson-Gamma formulations with latent variables to model inter-relational dependencies in dynamic knowledge graphs for link prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dynamic Regret for Non-Stationary Linear Bandits via Misspecification Reductions
item.description: Study develops optimal dynamic-regret algorithms for non-stationary linear bandits with round-specific feasible action sets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Variable Bit-width Quantization: Learning Per-Group Precision for "Bigger-but-Smaller" Language Models
item.description: Variable Bit-width Quantization trains each weight group to learn its own precision, achieving 3.9–8.4x better storage efficiency than FP16 while enabling faster inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Bootstrap Flow-Map Tree Sampling Enables Online Feedback Driven Search
item.description: BFMT enables efficient search with feedback by reducing computation through strategic sampling transitions from exploration to refinement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CoFEND: A Cross-Modal Fusion End-to-End Network for Cold-Start Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
item.description: Cross-modal fusion network for cold-start drug-drug interaction prediction using integrated knowledge graphs and graph autoencoders.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] In-span learning: adapting reduced-order models using their own predictions
item.description: In-span learning adapts reduced-order models by reweighting subspace basis vectors using incremental SVD of the model's own prediction trajectories.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Missingness as Signal: Channel-Independent Spectrogram Learning for Clinical Time Series Prediction
item.description: CISM, a spectrogram-based framework treating missingness as a predictive signal, improves ICU mortality prediction performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Precedent-Guided Co-Scientist for Side-Effect-Aware Drug Redesign
item.description: PRECEDE uses LLM reasoning over knowledge graphs to redesign drugs, mitigating side effects while preserving therapeutic function.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Individual Parameters in Weight-Sparse Transformers Appear Interpretable
item.description: Researchers find 12-31% of weights in sparse transformers are globally interpretable through automated descriptions of their function across input distributions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rank-Order N-of-M Codes for Sparse Distributed Memory: Disentangling Representation and Learning Effects in Noise Robustness Against Contemporary Neuromorphic Architectures
item.description: Rank-order N-of-M encoding improves Sparse Distributed Memory capacity and robustness, with major gains from encoder-learning interaction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MABLE: Masked Autoencoding with Bi-Lipschitz Decoding for Embeddings and Graph Metric Learning
item.description: Self-supervised framework MABLE combines masked reconstruction and bi-Lipschitz decoding to learn robust node and graph embeddings from heterogeneous geospatial data.
